changes.to:
You will not register for courses until you arrive on campus in January. Courses which VISP students are eligible to take while at Barnard include:
Courses designated BC, UN, C, R, V, and W
Courses numbered from 1000 through 4999
Students may not register for more than two Business courses
Please note that you are welcome to search for courses(http://www.columbia.edu/cu/bulletin/uwb/) but you should plan to work closely with your academic advisor during Orientation to put together an appropriate program.

classes in Journalism, Law, Engineering (except for "The Art of Engineering")
undergraduate students may not enroll in graduate school courses.

Swinburne University of Technology offers exchange students access to its full range of undergraduate and postgraduate courses. Students can take 3 or 4 units (37.5 to 50 credit points) per semester across multiple study areas, provided they meet the specific prerequisites for the course.
https://www.swinburne.edu.au/courses/

Exchange students may register for undergraduate courses in any department. Students take three classes per term. 
https://dartmouth.smartcatalogiq.com/en/current/orc/departments-programs-undergraduate/

※ Australian universities may accept standard TOEFL iBT scores for admission purposes; however, English language requirements for an Australian Student Visa are separately determined by the Australian Department of Home Affairs (DHA).

As the final decision on visa eligibility follows DHA requirements, students without a TOEFL iBT Australia score may face difficulties in obtaining a Student Visa.

Spanish B2 required for Spanish-taught courses, to be demonstrated during the admission process. To take Spanish language courses, you must have taken the placement test and be enrolled in the correct level.
Engineering · Humanities · Education field only - You may take courses from other schools if available.
